mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fx_bar_load (symbol, bar_date_time, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.barDateTime}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume})

INSERT INTO fx_bar_load_sma (symbol, bar_date_time, sma_range, sma_price, sma_cross) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.barDateTime}, #{item.smaRange}, #{item.smaPrice}, #{item.smaCross})

INSERT INTO fx_bar_load_rsi (symbol, bar_date_time, rsi_range, rsi_value, rsi_ma) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.barDateTime}, #{item.rsiRange}, #{item.rsiValue}, #{item.rsiMa})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(M.bar_date_time) AS existsCount, SUM( CASE WHEN M.bar_date_time IS NOT NULL AND (M.open_price != L.open_price OR M.high_price != L.high_price OR M.low_price != L.low_price OR M.close_price != L.close_price) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS diffCount FROM fx_bar_load L LEFT JOIN ${tableBarData} M ON M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_bar_${barType} SELECT L.symbol ,L.bar_date_time ,L.open_price ,L.high_price ,L.low_price ,L.close_price ,L.volume ,(L.high_price - L.open_price) ,(L.low_price - L.open_price) ,(L.close_price - L.open_price) ,(L.high_price - L.low_price) FROM fx_bar_load L WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fx_bar_${barType} M WHERE M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time )

INSERT INTO fx_bar_${barType}_sma (symbol, bar_date_time, sma_range, sma_price, sma_cross) SELECT L.symbol, L.bar_date_time, L.sma_range, L.sma_price, L.sma_cross FROM fx_bar_load_sma L WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fx_bar_${barType}_sma M WHERE M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time AND M.sma_range = L.sma_range )

INSERT INTO fx_bar_${barType}_rsi (symbol, bar_date_time, rsi_range, rsi_value, rsi_ma) SELECT L.symbol, L.bar_date_time, L.rsi_range, L.rsi_value, L.rsi_ma FROM fx_bar_load_rsi L WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fx_bar_${barType}_rsi M WHERE M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time AND M.rsi_range = L.rsi_range )
mapper.select: SELECT L.symbol, L.bar_date_time AS barDateTime, L.open_price AS openPrice, L.high_price AS highPrice, L.low_price AS lowPrice, L.close_price AS closePrice, L.volume FROM fx_bar_load L INNER JOIN fx_bar_${barType} M ON M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.open_price != L.open_price OR M.high_price != L.high_price OR M.low_price != L.low_price OR M.close_price != L.close_price)

SELECT L.symbol, L.bar_date_time AS barDateTime, L.sma_range AS smaRange, L.sma_price AS smaPrice, L.sma_cross AS smaCross FROM fx_bar_load_sma L INNER JOIN fx_bar_${barType}_sma M ON M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time AND M.sma_range = L.sma_range WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.sma_price != L.sma_price OR M.sma_cross != L.sma_cross)

SELECT L.symbol, L.bar_date_time AS barDateTime, L.rsi_range AS rsiRange, L.rsi_value AS rsiValue, L.rsi_ma AS rsiMa FROM fx_bar_load_rsi L INNER JOIN fx_bar_${barType}_rsi M ON M.symbol = L.symbol AND M.bar_date_time = L.bar_date_time AND M.rsi_range = L.rsi_range WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.rsi_value != L.rsi_value OR M.rsi_ma != L.rsi_ma)
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_bar_${barType} M INNER JOIN fx_bar_load L ON L.symbol = M.symbol AND L.bar_date_time = M.bar_date_time SET M.open_price = L.open_price, M.high_price = L.high_price, M.low_price = L.low_price, M.close_price = L.close_price, M.volume = L.volume WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.open_price != L.open_price OR M.high_price != L.high_price OR M.low_price != L.low_price OR M.close_price != L.close_price)

UPDATE fx_bar_${barType}_sma M INNER JOIN fx_bar_load_sma L ON L.symbol = M.symbol AND L.bar_date_time = M.bar_date_time AND L.sma_range = M.sma_range SET M.sma_price = L.sma_price, M.sma_cross = L.sma_cross WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.sma_price != L.sma_price OR M.sma_cross != L.sma_cross)

UPDATE fx_bar_${barType}_rsi M INNER JOIN fx_bar_load_rsi L ON L.symbol = M.symbol AND L.bar_date_time = M.bar_date_time AND L.rsi_range = M.rsi_range SET M.rsi_value = L.rsi_value, M.rsi_ma = L.rsi_ma WHERE L.symbol = #{symbol} AND (M.rsi_value != L.rsi_value OR M.rsi_ma != L.rsi_ma)
